creator: highcastle.cxx@gmail.com
text:
Thanks Mark Millard for pointing preboot var.
I run into the exact same problem on openbsd installation.
These steps worked for me:

- Unplug USBs
- (skip if no changes have been made to u-boot environment)
   boot to u-boot and restore env defaults, 
   env default -a
   saveenv
- Reboot into u-boot again and clear preboot env:
   setenv preboot
   saveenv
- boot to os with no USB memsticks inserted
- insert the USBs and reboot into os again
